title: taraxacum leptopholis
intro: Taraxacum leptopholis, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, primarily used for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum leptopholis include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a natural remedy for liver and kidney problems. Taraxacum leptopholis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties.
